commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=61d24705fad1d47dbf95ed3134b97d9725c3a626)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves `scripts/install.sh` Homebrew setup behind the Node version check and updates the installer test's ordering regex.

PR surface: Tests 0, Other 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level installer bug: current `main` calls `install_homebrew` before `check_node`, so a no-brew macOS user exits before adequate Node is considered. I did not run the live non-admin macOS account path.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because the patch has a concrete installer regression and missing real macOS behavior proof; automation should not supply the contributor's environment proof.

target.title: fix(install): skip Homebrew when adequate Node is already present
target.body:
## Summary

`install.sh` calls `install_homebrew` unconditionally before checking whether Node.js is already available. On macOS without admin rights and without Homebrew, this aborts the entire installation even when the existing Node satisfies the minimum version requirement (22.19+).

The user sees:

```
[1/3] Preparing environment
\· Homebrew not found, installing
\· Installing Homebrew
\✗ Installing Homebrew failed
Need sudo access on macOS (e.g. the user needs to be an Administrator)!
```

The workaround (`npm i -g openclaw@latest`) works, confirming brew is not needed when Node is present.

## Fix

Move `check_node` before `install_homebrew` so the Homebrew step is only reached when Node actually needs to be installed. Users with an adequate Node on PATH skip straight to the npm install stage.

## Verification

- **Behavior addressed**: install.sh calls install_homebrew unconditionally even when Node >= 22.19 is already on PATH, failing on non-admin macOS
- **Real environment tested**: macOS arm64, Node 22.19+, pnpm test runner
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/install-sh.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  ✓ |tooling| ../scripts/install-sh.test.ts (20 tests) 1891ms
    ✓ loads nvm before checking Node.js so stale system Node does not win  323ms
    ✓ promotes a supported Linux Node binary over stale PATH entries  383ms
    ✓ persists a supported Linux Node path before noninteractive shell guards  381ms
    ✓ reruns spinner-wrapped commands when gum reports ioctl failure  394ms

  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  20 passed (20)
  ```
- **Observed result after fix**: check_node runs before install_homebrew; the test `loads nvm before checking Node.js so stale system Node does not win` verifies the ordering with regex `/# Step 1: Node\.js[\s\S]*?load_nvm_for_node_detection\s+if ! check_node; then/` which confirms install_homebrew is inside the `!check_node` branch
- **What was not tested**: live non-admin macOS install (requires account without sudo)

Closes #83232
target.author: sebtardif
